texto: There are many movies which come with an attitude of black and white. I am good and you are bad. And there are many movies that are also trying to see the reality as it is or to discover what really is behind the character or events.
explicacao: Citação de Ashraf Barhom sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There are many movies which come with an attitude of black and white. I am good and you are bad. …” articula reflexao, good, character em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como character.

frase_original: There are many movies which come with an attitude of black and white. I am good and you are bad. And there are many movies that are also trying to see the reality as it is or to discover what really is behind the character or events.

texto: The two cultures of East and West are very different, and the priorities are very different. So when you understand that - if you are from this side or this side - when you understand that the other is different than you, and you respect these differences, you can build communication.

frase_original: The two cultures of East and West are very different, and the priorities are very different. So when you understand that - if you are from this side or this side - when you understand that the other is different than you, and you respect these differences, you can build communication.
